questions.question: What is the primary purpose of morphological operations like erosion and dilation in image processing, in relation to feature extraction?
questions.hint: Consider the role of these operations in removing noise and enhancing structural features from an image

questions.question: Explain the difference between opening and closing operations in morphological image processing. Provide an example to illustrate your answer.
questions.hint: Consider the effect of these operations on the structure of an image, and how they can be used for feature extraction

questions.question: Describe the concept of a 'hit-or-miss' transform in morphological image processing. What is the purpose of this transform, and how is it used in feature extraction?
questions.hint: Consider the application of hit-or-miss transforms in image segmentation and feature extraction
